name: momentum-planner
description: Use when the user asks to "keep the launch momentum going after launch week", "plan a changelog / release-notes cadence as GTM", or "is this update worth a relaunch"; produces a T+1→T+30 momentum plan — a launch-moment calendar (milestone / shipped-loop / badge moments only), announcement-tier routing (major = full-channel, medium = targeted, minor = changelog-only), a relaunch legitimacy call, spike-to-owned handoff briefs, and the next Tier-1 moment with launch-stacking spacing. Not for the 30
author: aaron-he-zhu
